sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ أَحْمَدُ إِلَى الصَّيْدَلِيَّةِ لِيَشْتَرِيَ دَوَاءً لِلسُّعَالِ.
sentences.translation: Ahmed je otišao u apoteku da kupi lijek za kašalj.
sentences.translationEn: Ahmed went to the pharmacy to buy cough medicine.

sentences.translation: Farmaceut je od njega tražio ljekarski recept.
sentences.translationEn: The pharmacist asked him for the medical prescription.

sentences.arabic: اشْتَرَى أَيْضًا بَعْضَ الْمُعَقِّمَاتِ وَالضِّمَادَاتِ لِلْإِسْعَافَاتِ الْأَوَّلِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Kupio je i neka sredstva za dezinfekciju i zavoje za prvu pomoć.
sentences.translationEn: He also bought some disinfectants and bandages for first aid.
